name: Macaroni Cheese Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni in boiling, salted water until tender.
2. Drain the macaroni.
3. Pour hot milk over bread crumbs. Reserve half cup cheese and add remaining cheese to milk mixture; cover and let stand until cheese melts.
4. Add pimiento, egg yolks, butter, parsley, onion, and salt.
5. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
6. Fold egg whites into macaroni mixture.
7. Pour the mixture into an ungreased baking dish.
8. Bake in a slow oven (350°F) about 50 minutes or until set.
9. Top with remaining cheese and return to oven for a few minutes until cheese melts.
10. Serve immediately.
Serves 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
